title: Transcript picker modal for selecting prior Claude Code sessions
purpose: Provides a modal interface for users to select from previously recorded agent chat sessions within a project, fetching session data from an API endpoint.
module_context: Exports a React functional component TranscriptPicker that accepts project context, onSelect callback, and onDismiss handler. Includes helper functions formatRelative and truncate for displaying session metadata.

steps.content: If no ISO timestamp is provided, return 'unknown'.
Parse the ISO timestamp into a numeric date value.
IF the parsed date is invalid, return 'unknown'.
Calculate the time difference between now and the parsed timestamp.
Convert the difference to seconds and determine the appropriate relative time unit.
Return the formatted relative time string with the appropriate unit.
If no string is provided, return an empty string.
Remove extra whitespace from the input string and trim leading/trailing spaces.
IF the cleaned string exceeds the maximum length, truncate it and append an ellipsis.
ELSE return the cleaned string as-is.
Initialize state for sessions, loading status, and error messages.
On component mount, fetch session data from the API endpoint for the specified project.
IF the fetch succeeds, update the sessions state with the received data.
IF the fetch fails, set the error state with an appropriate error message.
Set loading state to false after fetch completes.
Add a keyboard event listener for Escape key to dismiss the modal.
Render the modal UI with session list or loading/error states.
Handle user selection of a session by calling the onSelect callback with the session ID.
Set up a cleanup function to cancel pending fetch requests when component unmounts.
Fetch session data from the API endpoint using the project identifier.
Process the API response and update the sessions state.
Handle any errors that occur during the fetch operation.
Check if the pressed key is the Escape key.
IF the Escape key is pressed, stop event propagation and call the onDismiss handler.
Add a keyboard event listener for the Escape key to dismiss the modal.
Clean up the event listener when the component unmounts.
